title: Adjacent
body:
**Blocks**
- Crafting Table has been redesigned, and now has a bottom texture.
- Bookshelf's frame is consistent with Chiseled Bookshelf's. Books have been reshaded.
- Diamond Ore and Deepslate Diamond Ore have been reshaded.
- Dirt Path top has been reshaded
- Glow Lichen has been redesigned, and has better contrast against stone.
- Almost all flowers have been updated.

**Items**
- Many blocks now have inventory item textures:
  - Anvils
  - Azaleas
  - Chain
  - Carpets (and carpet-like things)
  - Enchanting Table
  - Lanterns
  - Lever
  - Torches
  - Pointed Dripstone
  - Sea Pickle
- Beetroot has its leaves back
- Cauldron fits with other items better
- Comparator and Repeater show their base
- Fireworks have outlines (and new shading)
- Ghast Tear is larger with more defined shading
- Glowstone Dust depicts small shards of the block
- Gunpowder has a unique shape and new colours
- Hopper reshaded
- Ink Sacs have a new shape
- Leather has a "generic" shape and better texture
- Nether Star has a larger, more dynamic shape
- Nether Wart represents its crop better
- Netherite Scrap is redone from scratch
- Prismarine items have been reshaded
- Paper, Maps, and Name Tags have been updated
- Rabbit Hide is more accurate to the shape of Rabbits
- Snowball reshaded
- Scute has a more definite shape
- Spider eyes have rounder shapes

**Entities**
- Creeper is leafier and has a more defined body
- Endermen have been reshaded
- Zombies have a "generic" face and clothes from the new Steve skin
- Sea Turtles have eye colour consistent with other mobs, removed redundant cube on bottom of shell.

**Credits**

- [I_am_Merp](https://modrinth.com/user/I_am_Merp) via [Brush-Up!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-up)
  - Sunflower model (edited)
  - sunflower_front.png
  - Inspiration (item textures, colour palettes)
  - *(P.S. use Adjacent with Brush-Up! for pixel consistent flower pots and like... way more textures!)
- [ImpSteve](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/impsteve/) via [ImpPack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/jp-s-imppack/)
  - Crafting Table top (edited colours)
- [StitchSprites](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/stitchsprites/) via [Faithless](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/faithless-4939685/)
  - Inspiration (Crafting Table, various item textures)
